text: Moving from the clean, corporate calm of the glass-walled meeting room to the vibrant, creatively charged R+D space, I am struck by the contrast between order and invention. Here, inspiration seems to circulate in the air, and I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. What does it mean to innovate, to move beyond mere function and seek understanding? Among these exhibits, I feel at home—questioning, exploring, alive with the thrill of intellectual pursuit.
